title: Smoky British Turkey Hash
description: A hearty British-inspired dish featuring turkey mince, crispy hash browns, and a smoky twist.
instructions: Heat a large non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the turkey mince, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook the patties for 5-6 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook the hash browns in a separate pan until crispy.
Serve the turkey patties with hash browns and enjoy.
